hooks.command: bash -lc 'norm(){ r="${1:-}"; r="${r//\\//}"; while [ "${#r}" -gt 1 ] && [ "${r%/}" != "$r" ]; do r="${r%/}"; done; printf "%s\n" "$r"; }; guard=""; for c in "${HIKSPINE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$(pwd)" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"; do c="$(norm "$c")"; [ -n "$c" ] && [ -f "$c/hooks/guard.sh" ] && guard="$c/hooks/guard.sh" && break; done; if [ -z "$guard" ]; then for b in "${HOME:-}" "${USERPROFILE:-}" "${APPDATA:-}" "${LOCALAPPDATA:-}" "/mnt/c/Users" "/mnt/d" "/mnt/e"; do [ -n "$b" ] || continue; guard="$(find "$b" -maxdepth 10 -path "*/hooks/guard.sh" -print -quit 2>/dev/null || true)"; [ -n "$guard" ] && break; done; fi; if [ -n "$guard" ]; then exec bash "$guard"; fi; echo "[HIKSPINE-HOOK] allowed: cannot locate hikspine hook" >&2; exit 0'
